title: Zuri's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Follow baby Zuri as she plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, spring flowers! Zuri sees pretty pink flowers hiding behind green leaves.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes playing peek-a-boo behind pink cherry blossom branches in a spring garden with soft pastel colors

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, summer sun! Zuri finds bright yellow butterflies dancing in the warm sunshine.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes reaching toward colorful butterflies in a bright summer meadow with vibrant yellows and blues

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, autumn leaves! Zuri hides behind big orange and red leaves falling from trees.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes peeking through a pile of warm-toned autumn leaves in oranges, reds, and golds

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, winter snow! Zuri catches soft white snowflakes on her mittens. All seasons are fun!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes wearing winter clothes catching snowflakes in a peaceful winter scene with cool blues and whites

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri find in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Zuri finds pretty pink flowers hiding behind green leaves!

questions.question: What flies around Zuri in summer?
questions.explanation: Bright yellow butterflies dance around Zuri in the warm summer sunshine!

questions.question: What falls in winter?
questions.explanation: Soft white snowflakes fall in winter, and Zuri catches them on her mittens!
